title: Creating Boards For A Painting Contractor
excerpt: I own a small painting business, and I would like help setting up my boards. Thanks!

posts.author: GallagherPaint (Michael Gallagher)
posts.cookedHtml: I own a small painting business, and I would like help setting up my boards. Thanks!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GallagherPaint - welcome to the community!

We would love the opportunity to discuss your business and how we can be of assistance to get you up and running on monday.com with the perfect solution.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also skilled in external integration programs such as make.com to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps. Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let us know and we will do our very best to accommodate you personally.

Looking forward to connecting!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GallagherPaint

Welcome to the community!

At upstream, we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @GallagherPaint ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out. At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can help you optimize your workflow and keep track of all projects from start to finish, streamline your communications and ensure your account is set up according to monday best practices.

We also have a wealth of experience in creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your workflow by integrating with any other software you might possibly use.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @GallagherPaint and welcome to the forums!

There are a ton of great partners to work with and I am happy to introduce CarbonWeb. We are a monday.com Channel and Solutions Partner who work with members of the community every day. We have been fortunate enough to work with a fair amount of service based companies to produce their ideal workflows. I would love to grab some time with you to see how our team might be able to help.

If you’d like to have an initial consultation you can schedule a time here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get your monday set up!
